conversation.message: How have you been feeling lately?
Honestly, I’ve been really down. I try to focus on the day ahead, but the fatigue just wears me out.
You mentioned the fatigue wears you out—how's your sleep been lately?
It’s been terrible. I wake up multiple times in the night, and I just can’t seem to catch up on rest.
With the sleep being so rough, do you find it hard to get excited about things you used to enjoy?
Yeah, it’s hard to find the energy for things I used to love. I just feel so... drained.
When you feel so drained like that, does it change how you see yourself or your day-to-day?
Yeah, it does. I look at the day ahead and think, "What’s the point?" It feels like I’m just going through the motions, and it’s hard to see a way out of it.
You said it's hard to see a way out—does that feeling make the future seem kind of hopeless?
It does. I look ahead and I just see more of the same. I don't see a way to turn it around, so I don't know what the future holds.
You mentioned that things feel pointless - when did that start feeling this strong?
It's been building up over the past few months. I used to have things I was working towards, but now I just feel like I'm just existing.
When you say nothing matters, what parts of life feel most empty lately?
Everything, honestly. I used to think I had a purpose, but now I feel like I'm just waiting for time to pass.
How do you see the next few weeks unfolding for you?
I don't know. Just more of the same. I'm just trying to get through the days until things get better, but I don't know if they will.
How much of this feels like giving up versus feeling exhausted?
It's hard to tell. I don't think I'm giving up exactly, but I also don't know what else to do. I just feel so... done.
Do you feel like people would be better off without you, or is it more that you feel stuck?
I don't think people would be better off without me, but I do feel like I'm just holding everyone back.
